canonical_definition: A native multilingual benchmark containing 89,107 multiple-choice questions across 14 languages and 63 academic disciplines, designed to assess multilingual and multidisciplinary capabilities of LLMs with native content, difficulty control, and disciplinary balance.
papers: TableEval: A Real-World Benchmark for Complex, Multilingual, and Multi-Structured Table Question Answering
